mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO message (user_id, template_code, params_json, related_bus_route_id, dedup_key, created_by) VALUES
(#{r.userId}, #{r.templateCode}, #{r.paramsJson}, #{r.relatedBusRouteId}, #{r.dedupKey}, #{r.actor})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE id = id
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM message WHERE user_id=#{userId} AND is_read=0 AND deleted=0

SELECT m.id, m.user_id AS userId, m.template_code AS templateCode, m.params_json AS params, br.source_id AS relatedSourceId, m.is_read AS isRead, m.created_at AS createdAt FROM message m LEFT JOIN bus_route br ON br.id = m.related_bus_route_id WHERE m.user_id=#{userId} AND m.deleted=0 ORDER BY m.created_at DESC, m.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE message SET deleted=1 WHERE user_id=#{userId} AND id=#{id} AND deleted=0
mapper.select: SELECT f.user_id AS userId, b.id AS busRouteId, b.version AS version, b.route AS route, b.source_id AS sourceId FROM favorite f JOIN bus_route b ON b.id = f.bus_route_id AND b.deleted = 0 WHERE f.deleted = 0 AND b.version > 0 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM message m WHERE m.user_id = f.user_id AND m.deleted = 0 AND m.dedup_key = CONCAT('bus:', b.id, ':v:', b.version) )
